mission.title: argo-workflows: `BASE_HREF`  is not working
mission.description: `BASE_HREF`  is not working. This issue affects 53+ users.

steps.title: Identify argo-workflows troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your argo-workflows deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review argo-workflows configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows
kubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows
```
Cant Access argo UI if I change the `BASE_HREF` to something other than `/`

I want it to be accessible at xxx.com/argo 

To reproduce it you can just change the env variable `BASE_HREF` to something other than /.

steps.title: Apply the fix for `BASE_HREF`  is not working
steps.description:
Set the `BASE_HREF` environment variable on the argo-server deployment to serve the UI under a subpath. Also configure the Ingress to route the subpath to the argo-server service.
```yaml
- name: BASE_HREF
  value: /argo/
```

steps.title: Confirm `BASE_HREF`  is not working is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Set the BASE_HREF environment variable on the argo-server container and configure the Ingress path to match. The fix PR corrected how the UI resolves asset paths under a subpath.
codeSnippets:
rules:
  - host: {{domain-name}}
    http:
      paths:
      - backend:
          serviceName: argo-server
          servicePort: http
        path: /argo(/|$)(.*)

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible.
